---
title: "2016 Year in Review"
date: 2017-01-08
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
description: "A personal review of 2016: highlights from travel, a wedding reception in Lithuania, art shows, the O'Reilly course launch, and books recommended from the year."
categories: [personal]
---

## Some of my major life highlights:

As I look back on 2016, I'm amazed at both how quickly the year went and yet how much happened.

### Personal


- Julija and I celebrated our marriage with a reception in beautiful Vilnius, Lithuania.

- Thanksgiving with my parents + Jax/Derek in Monterey, CA. 

- Spent Christmas holidays with Julija's family in Lithuania.

- Spent New Year's in New York City.


### Professional


- Finished my second year at [SVDS](http://svds.com/) as a Senior Data Scientist.

- My screencast video course: [Jupyter Notebook for Data Science Teams](http://shop.oreilly.com/product/0636920044260.do) went on sale!


### Creative


- Had [my art](http://www.jbwhitmoreart.com/) selected and shown in a [gallery](http://www.sparkarts.com/).

- Showed [my art](http://www.jbwhitmoreart.com/) at [SF Open Studios](http://www.shared-sf.com/2016/09/02/2016-sf-open-studios-october-21-23/).


## Recommended Books Read This Year

### Fiction


- [The Goldfinch](http://amzn.to/23SH2ij) by Donna Tartt

- [The Invisible Life of Ivan Isaenko](http://amzn.to/2ct0MTL) by Scott Stambach

- [Hum](http://amzn.to/2fO0wNm) by Jamaal May


### Non-fiction


- [Lawrence in Arabia](http://amzn.to/2jjeDwj) by Scott Anderson

- [Lean In](http://amzn.to/2b5JrwJ) by Sheryl Sandberg

- [Algorithms to Live By](http://amzn.to/2gXg3Ne) by Brian Christian


## Places that I spent time this year

![flight animation](http://jonathanwhitmore.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/12/animated-opt.gif)


- Dallas, TX, USA -- (family/friends)

- Mountain View, CA, USA -- where I live and work

- San Diego, CA, USA -- SVDS client that took me there throughout the year

- Berkeley, CA, USA -- AstroHackWeek

- Maui, HI, USA & Kauai, HI, USA -- Honeymoon!

- Salt Lake City, UT, USA -- First time to visit! Met up with Lauri and Vaiva and their brand new kid WHATSHISNAME.

- Copenhagen, DNK -- Day trip on the way to Vilnius.

- Vilnius, LTU -- Our wedding reception.

- Riga, LVA -- Xmas eve and day.

- NYC, USA for New Year's Eve, Rockettes Christmas Spectacular, The Present 

- Jacksonville, FL, USA -- Katie/Alex Mendez wedding.

- Monterey, CA, USA -- Thanksgiving w/ my parents, and Jax & Derek.


## Looking forward to in the new year

![concentric circles](http://jonathanwhitmore.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/Whitmore_MJFWNKRD.jpg)


- The above artwork MJFWNKRD (2017) was selected for a juried art show at the [Arc Gallery](http://www.arc-sf.com/) at the end of January.

- Trip to the Netherlands to celebrate my wife winning [Best Physics Thesis](https://www.fom.nl/en/news/press-releases/2016/10/31/fom-prizes-for-valorisation-and-best-physics-thesis-award/) published in the Netherlands last year.

- A keynote speaker engagement for the [PhD Career Conference at USC](https://careers.usc.edu/students/discover-resources/graduate-and-doctoral-student-resources/beyond-the-phd-home/).

- Teaching a workshop for [Stanford Continuing Studies](https://continuingstudies.stanford.edu/) during the Spring quarter.
